overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a snowy mountain landscape rendered in a game engine. The camera moves steadily along a snow-covered trail overlooking a frozen lake and distant peaks, passing through rocky outcrops and snow-laden pine trees under a bright clear sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain overlook with frozen lake view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a snow-covered trail overlooking a frozen lake and distant mountain range

entered.detail: frozen lake visible in the valley below, surrounded by snow-covered terrain
snow-capped mountain peaks forming the horizon line
tall conifer tree with heavy snow on its branches
prominent rocky outcrop covered in snow on the right side of the trail
snow-covered fallen log lying beside the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a panoramic view of a frozen lake nestled in a snowy mountain valley. The camera moves forward along a trail bordered by snow-covered pines and rocky outcrops, with distant mountain peaks visible under a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow mountain pass between rock walls

events.description: entering narrow passage between high rock walls

agents.ego_description: proceeding through a narrow rocky passage with steep stone walls on both sides

entered.detail: steep rock wall rising on the left side of the narrow path
steep rock wall rising on the right side of the narrow path
tall jagged rock formation visible ahead through the passage

segments.scene_description: The trail narrows significantly as the camera enters a passage flanked by steep rocky cliffs. The frozen lake disappears from view as the path winds between the stone walls, with a prominent rock peak visible ahead and occasional snow-covered pines in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snowy trail with forested valley view

events.description: exiting narrow rock passage into open landscape with forest view

agents.ego_description: walking along an open snowy ridge with expansive views of a snow-covered forest valley

entered.detail: vast expanse of snow-covered trees covering the valley below
single tall pine tree standing on the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: Exiting the narrow passage, the scene opens to reveal a sweeping view of a snow-covered forest canopy stretching across the valley. The trail continues along a snowy ridge lined with scattered pine trees, with the distant mountain range still visible on the horizon under the bright winter sun.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open mountain valley into a narrow rocky gorge before emerging onto a high snowy ridge. It begins with a panoramic view of a frozen lake, moving forward along a trail bordered by snow-covered pines and distant peaks under a clear blue sky. As the path narrows, the camera enters a passage flanked by steep rocky cliffs, causing the lake to disappear from view while the trail winds toward a prominent rock peak. The scene then opens as the camera exits the stone walls, revealing a sweeping view of a snow-covered forest canopy stretching across the valley. Finally, the movement continues along a snowy ridge lined with scattered pines, keeping the distant mountain range visible on the horizon under the bright winter sun.
